explanation: Omission: Removed the suspicious command-line flags (/dll or /exe) that trigger the Sigma rule, but the command still uses ilasm.exe with a benign purpose (displaying help).
Insertion: Wrapped the command in a harmless shell invocation (cmd.exe /c) to avoid direct detection of the suspicious executable in the command line.
Substitution: Replaced the default path with a benign lab placeholder (C:\Lab\tools\ilasm.exe) to avoid the suspicious path match while preserving the executable family and intent.
